title: Unsupervised Complementary-aware Multi-process Fusion for Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉位置识别的无监督互补感知多进程融合
abstract: A recent approach to the Visual Place Recognition (VPR) problem has been to fuse the place recognition estimates of multiple complementary VPR techniques simultaneously. However, selecting the optimal set of techniques to use in a specific deployment environment a-priori is a difficult and unresolved challenge. Further, to the best of our knowledge, no method exists which can select a set of techniques on a frame-by-frame basis in response to image-to-image variations. In this work, we propose an unsupervised algorithm that finds the most robust set of VPR techniques to use in the current deployment environment, on a frame-by-frame basis. The selection of techniques is determined by an analysis of the similarity scores between the current query image and the collection of database images and does not require ground-truth information. We demonstrate our approach on a wide variety of datasets and VPR techniques and show that the proposed dynamic multi-process fusion (Dyn-MPF) has superior VPR performance compared to a variety of challenging competitive methods, some of which are given an unfair advantage through access to the ground-truth information.

abstract_zh: 解决视觉位置识别 (VPR) 问题的最新方法是同时融合多种互补 VPR 技术的位置识别估计。然而，预先选择在特定部署环境中使用的最佳技术集是一项困难且尚未解决的挑战。此外，据我们所知，不存在可以逐帧选择一组技术来响应图像到图像变化的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无监督算法，可以逐帧找到当前部署环境中使用的最强大的 VPR 技术集。技术的选择是通过分析当前查询图像与数据库图像集合之间的相似性分数来确定的，不需要真实信息。我们在各种数据集和 VPR 技术上展示了我们的方法，并表明所提出的动态多进程融合（Dyn-MPF）与各种具有挑战性的竞争方法相比具有优越的 VPR 性能，其中一些方法通过访问真实信息而获得了不公平的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督动态多进程融合方法（Dyn-MPF），可在视觉地点识别任务中根据当前环境逐帧选择最优的互补VPR技术组合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在部署环境中预先选择最优VPR技术集，且无法应对图像变化进行动态调整，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 通过分析查询图像与数据库图像的相似性分数，无监督地选择当前最稳健的VPR技术组合，无需地面真实信息。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和VPR技术上验证，Dyn-MPF性能优于包括有地面真实信息优势的竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态选择互补VPR技术的问题，提升了视觉地点识别的鲁棒性与适应性。

authors_text: Shen Wang,M. Atif Qureshi,Luis Miralles-Pechuán,Thien Huynh-The,Thippa Reddy Gadekallu,Madhusanka Liyanage
title: Applications of Explainable AI for 6G: Technical Aspects, Use Cases, and Research Challenges
title_zh: 可解释人工智能在 6G 中的应用：技术方面、用例和研究挑战
abstract: When 5G began its commercialisation journey around 2020, the discussion on the vision of 6G also surfaced. Researchers expect 6G to have higher bandwidth, coverage, reliability, energy efficiency, lower latency, and an integrated "human-centric" network system powered by artificial intelligence (AI). Such a 6G network will lead to an excessive number of automated decisions made in real-time. These decisions can range widely, from network resource allocation to collision avoidance for self-driving cars. However, the risk of losing control over decision-making may increase due to high-speed, data-intensive AI decision-making beyond designers' and users' comprehension. The promising explainable AI (XAI) methods can mitigate such risks by enhancing the transparency of the black-box AI decision-making process. This paper surveys the application of XAI towards the upcoming 6G age in every aspect, including 6G technologies (e.g., intelligent radio, zero-touch network management) and 6G use cases (e.g., industry 5.0). Moreover, we summarised the lessons learned from the recent attempts and outlined important research challenges in applying XAI for 6G in the near future.

abstract_zh: 当2020年左右5G开始商用之旅时，关于6G愿景的讨论也浮出水面。研究人员预计6G将具有更高的带宽、覆盖范围、可靠性、能源效率、更低的延迟，以及由人工智能（AI）驱动的集成“以人为中心”的网络系统。这样的 6G 网络将导致过多的实时自动化决策。这些决策范围广泛，从网络资源分配到自动驾驶汽车的碰撞避免。然而，由于高速、数据密集型人工智能决策超出了设计者和用户的理解范围，失去决策控制的风险可能会增加。有前途的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法可以通过提高黑盒人工智能决策过程的透明度来减轻此类风险。本文调查了XAI在即将到来的6G时代各个方面的应用，包括6G技术（例如智能无线电、零接触网络管理）和6G用例（例如工业5.0）。此外，我们总结了最近尝试中的经验教训，并概述了在不久的将来将 XAI 应用于 6G 的重要研究挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可解释人工智能（XAI）在6G技术中的应用，涵盖技术特性、使用案例及研究挑战。
AI.motivation: 6G网络将依赖AI进行实时自动化决策，但黑箱AI可能导致决策失控风险，需通过XAI提升透明度以确保可信度。
AI.method: 通过调研现有XAI方法在6G相关技术（如智能无线电、零接触网络管理）和应用场景（如工业5.0）中的应用，总结经验并分析挑战。
AI.result: 系统梳理了XAI在6G中的潜在应用方向，归纳了当前研究的局限性，并提出了未来需解决的关键技术难题。
AI.conclusion: XAI是保障6G安全可靠部署的核心技术，需进一步探索其与6G高复杂性场景的深度融合方法。

title: CWS-PResUNet: Music Source Separation with Channel-wise Subband Phase-aware ResUNet
title_zh: CWS-PResUNet：使用通道子带相位感知 ResUNet 进行音乐源分离
abstract: Music source separation (MSS) shows active progress with deep learning models in recent years. Many MSS models perform separations on spectrograms by estimating bounded ratio masks and reusing the phases of the mixture. When using convolutional neural networks (CNN), weights are usually shared within a spectrogram during convolution regardless of the different patterns between frequency bands. In this study, we propose a new MSS model, channel-wise subband phase-aware ResUNet (CWS-PResUNet), to decompose signals into subbands and estimate an unbound complex ideal ratio mask (cIRM) for each source. CWS-PResUNet utilizes a channel-wise subband (CWS) feature to limit unnecessary global weights sharing on the spectrogram and reduce computational resource consumptions. The saved computational cost and memory can in turn allow for a larger architecture. On the MUSDB18HQ test set, we propose a 276-layer CWS-PResUNet and achieve state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance on vocals with an 8.92 signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) score. By combining CWS-PResUNet and Demucs, our ByteMSS system ranks the 2nd on vocals score and 5th on average score in the 2021 ISMIR Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge limited training data track (leaderboard A). Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/haoheliu/2021-ISMIR-MSS-Challenge-CWS-PResUNet

abstract_zh: 近年来，音乐源分离（MSS）在深度学习模型方面取得了积极进展。许多 MSS 模型通过估计有界比率掩模并重用混合物的相来对频谱图进行分离。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 时，无论频段之间的模式如何不同，权重通常在卷积期间在频谱图中共享。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新的 MSS 模型，即通道子带相位感知 ResUNet (CWS-PResUNet)，用于将信号分解为子带并估计每个源的无界复数理想比率掩模 (cIRM)。 CWS-PResUNet 利用通道子带 (CWS) 功能来限制频谱图上不必要的全局权重共享，并减少计算资源消耗。节省的计算成本和内存反过来又可以允许更大的架构。在 MUSDB18HQ 测试集上，我们提出了 276 层 CWS-PResUNet，并在人声方面实现了最先进的 (SoTA) 性能，信号失真比 (SDR) 得分为 8.92。通过结合 CWS-PResUNet 和 Demucs，我们的 ByteMSS 系统在 2021 年 ISMIR Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge 有限训练数据赛道（排行榜 A）中声乐得分排名第二，平均得分排名第五。我们的代码和预训练模型已公开：https://github.com/haoheliu/2021-ISMIR-MSS-Challenge-CWS-PResUNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CWS-PResUNet的新音乐源分离模型，通过通道级子带相位感知的ResUNet结构实现更高效的音乐源分离。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在使用卷积神经网络时存在频带间权重共享不合理的问题，导致计算资源浪费且无法充分捕捉频率差异特征。
AI.method: 将信号分解为子带并估计无界复理想比值掩码（cIRM），采用通道级子带（CWS）特征减少全局权重共享，结合ResUNet架构并优化计算资源分配。
AI.result: 在MUSDB18HQ测试集上，276层CWS-PResUNet模型取得8.92 SDR的语音分离最先进性能；与Demucs结合的ByteMSS系统在2021 ISMIR MDX挑战赛中排名第二（语音得分）和第五（平均得分）。
AI.conclusion: CWS-PResUNet通过子带特征优化和计算资源重分配有效提升了音乐源分离性能，验证了通道级设计在深度学习模型中的优势。

search_text: CWS-PResUNet: Music Source Separation with Channel-wise Subband Phase-aware ResUNet CWS-PResUNet：使用通道子带相位感知 ResUNet 进行音乐源分离 Music source separation (MSS) shows active progress with deep learning models in recent years. Many MSS models perform separations on spectrograms by estimating bounded ratio masks and reusing the phases of the mixture. When using convolutional neural networks (CNN), weights are usually shared within a spectrogram during convolution regardless of the different patterns between frequency bands. In this study, we propose a new MSS model, channel-wise subband phase-aware ResUNet (CWS-PResUNet), to decompose signals into subbands and estimate an unbound complex ideal ratio mask (cIRM) for each source. CWS-PResUNet utilizes a channel-wise subband (CWS) feature to limit unnecessary global weights sharing on the spectrogram and reduce computational resource consumptions. The saved computational cost and memory can in turn allow for a larger architecture. On the MUSDB18HQ test set, we propose a 276-layer CWS-PResUNet and achieve state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance on vocals with an 8.92 signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) score. By combining CWS-PResUNet and Demucs, our ByteMSS system ranks the 2nd on vocals score and 5th on average score in the 2021 ISMIR Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge limited training data track (leaderboard A). Our code and pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/haoheliu/2021-ISMIR-MSS-Challenge-CWS-PResUNet 近年来，音乐源分离（MSS）在深度学习模型方面取得了积极进展。许多 MSS 模型通过估计有界比率掩模并重用混合物的相来对频谱图进行分离。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 时，无论频段之间的模式如何不同，权重通常在卷积期间在频谱图中共享。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新的 MSS 模型，即通道子带相位感知 ResUNet (CWS-PResUNet)，用于将信号分解为子带并估计每个源的无界复数理想比率掩模 (cIRM)。 CWS-PResUNet 利用通道子带 (CWS) 功能来限制频谱图上不必要的全局权重共享，并减少计算资源消耗。节省的计算成本和内存反过来又可以允许更大的架构。在 MUSDB18HQ 测试集上，我们提出了 276 层 CWS-PResUNet，并在人声方面实现了最先进的 (SoTA) 性能，信号失真比 (SDR) 得分为 8.92。通过结合 CWS-PResUNet 和 Demucs，我们的 ByteMSS 系统在 2021 年 ISMIR Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge 有限训练数据赛道（排行榜 A）中声乐得分排名第二，平均得分排名第五。我们的代码和预训练模型已公开：https://github.com/haoheliu/2021-ISMIR-MSS-Challenge-CWS-PResUNet 本文提出了一种名为CWS-PResUNet的新音乐源分离模型，通过通道级子带相位感知的ResUNet结构实现更高效的音乐源分离。 Haohe Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Jiafeng Liu cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

title: Trajectory-Constrained Deep Latent Visual Attention for Improved Local Planning in Presence of Heterogeneous Terrain
title_zh: 轨迹约束的深度潜在视觉注意，用于改进存在异质地形的局部规划
comment: Published in International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2021 proceedings. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/traj-constrain-visual-attn
comments: Published in International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2021 proceedings. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/traj-constrain-visual-attn
abstract: We present a reward-predictive, model-based deep learning method featuring trajectory-constrained visual attention for local planning in visual navigation tasks. Our method learns to place visual attention at locations in latent image space which follow trajectories caused by vehicle control actions to enhance predictive accuracy during planning. The attention model is jointly optimized by the task-specific loss and an additional trajectory-constraint loss, allowing adaptability yet encouraging a regularized structure for improved generalization and reliability. Importantly, visual attention is applied in latent feature map space instead of raw image space to promote efficient planning. We validated our model in visual navigation tasks of planning low turbulence, collision-free trajectories in off-road settings and hill climbing with locking differentials in the presence of slippery terrain. Experiments involved randomized procedural generated simulation and real-world environments. We found our method improved generalization and learning efficiency when compared to no-attention and self-attention alternatives.
summary: We present a reward-predictive, model-based deep learning method featuring trajectory-constrained visual attention for local planning in visual navigation tasks. Our method learns to place visual attention at locations in latent image space which follow trajectories caused by vehicle control actions to enhance predictive accuracy during planning. The attention model is jointly optimized by the task-specific loss and an additional trajectory-constraint loss, allowing adaptability yet encouraging a regularized structure for improved generalization and reliability. Importantly, visual attention is applied in latent feature map space instead of raw image space to promote efficient planning. We validated our model in visual navigation tasks of planning low turbulence, collision-free trajectories in off-road settings and hill climbing with locking differentials in the presence of slippery terrain. Experiments involved randomized procedural generated simulation and real-world environments. We found our method improved generalization and learning efficiency when compared to no-attention and self-attention alternatives.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于模型的奖励预测深度学习方法，该方法具有轨迹约束的视觉注意力，用于视觉导航任务中的局部规划。我们的方法学习将视觉注意力放在潜在图像空间中的位置上，这些位置遵循车辆控制动作引起的轨迹，以提高规划过程中的预测准确性。注意力模型通过特定于任务的损失和额外的轨迹约束损失联合优化，允许适应性，同时鼓励正则化结构以提高泛化性和可靠性。重要的是，视觉注意力应用于潜在特征图空间而不是原始图像空间，以促进有效的规划。我们在视觉导航任务中验证了我们的模型，包括在越野环境中规划低湍流、无碰撞的轨迹，以及在湿滑地形中使用锁定差速器爬山。实验涉及随机程序生成的模拟和真实环境。我们发现，与无注意力和自注意力替代方案相比，我们的方法提高了泛化能力和学习效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轨迹约束的深度潜在视觉注意机制，用于复杂地形下的视觉导航局部规划。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉导航在异质地形中面临轨迹预测不准确和碰撞风险高的问题，需提升模型对车辆控制轨迹的适应性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计奖励预测模型，结合轨迹约束损失函数，在潜在特征图空间而非原始图像空间应用视觉注意机制，联合优化任务损失与轨迹正则化目标。
AI.result: 在生成式模拟和真实地形实验中，该方法相比无注意机制和自注意机制，在轨迹平滑性、碰撞避免率和学习效率上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹约束的潜在视觉注意机制能有效增强复杂地形下局部规划的鲁棒性与泛化能力，为自动驾驶提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhenyu Li,Zehui Chen,Ang Li,Liangji Fang,Qinhong Jiang,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang,Bolei Zhou,Hang Zhao
title: SimIPU: Simple 2D Image and 3D Point Cloud Unsupervised Pre-Training for Spatial-Aware Visual Representations
title_zh: SimIPU：用于空间感知视觉表示的简单 2D 图像和 3D 点云无监督预训练
comment: Accepted to 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2022)
comments: Accepted to 36th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2022)
abstract: Pre-training has become a standard paradigm in many computer vision tasks. However, most of the methods are generally designed on the RGB image domain. Due to the discrepancy between the two-dimensional image plane and the three-dimensional space, such pre-trained models fail to perceive spatial information and serve as sub-optimal solutions for 3D-related tasks. To bridge this gap, we aim to learn a spatial-aware visual representation that can describe the three-dimensional space and is more suitable and effective for these tasks. To leverage point clouds, which are much more superior in providing spatial information compared to images, we propose a simple yet effective 2D Image and 3D Point cloud Unsupervised pre-training strategy, called SimIPU. Specifically, we develop a multi-modal contrastive learning framework that consists of an intra-modal spatial perception module to learn a spatial-aware representation from point clouds and an inter-modal feature interaction module to transfer the capability of perceiving spatial information from the point cloud encoder to the image encoder, respectively. Positive pairs for contrastive losses are established by the matching algorithm and the projection matrix. The whole framework is trained in an unsupervised end-to-end fashion. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore contrastive learning pre-training strategies for outdoor multi-modal datasets, containing paired camera images and LIDAR point clouds. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/zhyever/SimIPU.

Specifically, we develop a multi-modal contrastive learning framework that consists of an intra-modal spatial perception module to learn a spatial-aware representation from point clouds and an inter-modal feature interaction module to transfer the capability of perceiving spatial information from the point cloud encoder to the image encoder, respectively. Positive pairs for contrastive losses are established by the matching algorithm and the projection matrix. The whole framework is trained in an unsupervised end-to-end fashion. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore contrastive learning pre-training strategies for outdoor multi-modal datasets, containing paired camera images and LIDAR point clouds. abstract_zh: 预训练已成为许多计算机视觉任务中的标准范例。然而，大多数方法通常是在 RGB 图像域上设计的。由于二维图像平面和三维空间之间的差异，此类预训练模型无法感知空间信息，并且无法作为 3D 相关任务的次优解决方案。为了弥补这一差距，我们的目标是学习一种空间感知的视觉表示，它可以描述三维空间，并且更适合和有效地完成这些任务。为了利用点云（与图像相比，点云在提供空间信息方面更加优越），我们提出了一种简单而有效的 2D 图像和 3D 点云无监督预训练策略，称为 SimIPU。具体来说，我们开发了一个多模态对比学习框架，该框架由模内空间感知模块和模间特征交互模块组成，模内空间感知模块用于从点云学习空间感知表示，模间特征交互模块用于将感知空间信息的能力从点云编码器转移到图像编码器。对比损失的正对是通过匹配算法和投影矩阵建立的。整个框架以无监督的端到端方式进行训练。据我们所知，这是第一项探索户外多模态数据集对比学习预训练策略的研究，其中包含配对相机图像和激光雷达点云。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/zhyever/SimIPU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimIPU方法，通过结合2D图像和3D点云的无监督预训练，学习空间感知的视觉表示以提升3D相关任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型多基于2D图像，难以捕捉3D空间信息，导致在3D任务中表现不佳。点云能提供更优的空间信息，但缺乏有效利用的预训练策略。
AI.method: 设计多模态对比学习框架，包含点云内模态空间感知模块和图像-点云跨模态特征交互模块，通过匹配算法与投影矩阵构建正样本对，端到端无监督训练。
AI.result: 首次在户外多模态数据集（含相机图像与LiDAR点云）上验证对比学习预训练策略，实验表明方法在空间感知任务中优于现有方案。
AI.conclusion: SimIPU通过跨模态知识迁移有效提升模型空间理解能力，为多模态预训练提供新思路，代码与模型已开源。

search_text: SimIPU: Simple 2D Image and 3D Point Cloud Unsupervised Pre-Training for Spatial-Aware Visual Representations SimIPU：用于空间感知视觉表示的简单 2D 图像和 3D 点云无监督预训练 Pre-training has become a standard paradigm in many computer vision tasks. However, most of the methods are generally designed on the RGB image domain. Due to the discrepancy between the two-dimensional image plane and the three-dimensional space, such pre-trained models fail to perceive spatial information and serve as sub-optimal solutions for 3D-related tasks. To bridge this gap, we aim to learn a spatial-aware visual representation that can describe the three-dimensional space and is more suitable and effective for these tasks. To leverage point clouds, which are much more superior in providing spatial information compared to images, we propose a simple yet effective 2D Image and 3D Point cloud Unsupervised pre-training strategy, called SimIPU. Specifically, we develop a multi-modal contrastive learning framework that consists of an intra-modal spatial perception module to learn a spatial-aware representation from point clouds and an inter-modal feature interaction module to transfer the capability of perceiving spatial information from the point cloud encoder to the image encoder, respectively. Positive pairs for contrastive losses are established by the matching algorithm and the projection matrix. The whole framework is trained in an unsupervised end-to-end fashion. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore contrastive learning pre-training strategies for outdoor multi-modal datasets, containing paired camera images and LIDAR point clouds. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/zhyever/SimIPU. 预训练已成为许多计算机视觉任务中的标准范例。然而，大多数方法通常是在 RGB 图像域上设计的。由于二维图像平面和三维空间之间的差异，此类预训练模型无法感知空间信息，并且无法作为 3D 相关任务的次优解决方案。为了弥补这一差距，我们的目标是学习一种空间感知的视觉表示，它可以描述三维空间，并且更适合和有效地完成这些任务。为了利用点云（与图像相比，点云在提供空间信息方面更加优越），我们提出了一种简单而有效的 2D 图像和 3D 点云无监督预训练策略，称为 SimIPU。具体来说，我们开发了一个多模态对比学习框架，该框架由模内空间感知模块和模间特征交互模块组成，模内空间感知模块用于从点云学习空间感知表示，模间特征交互模块用于将感知空间信息的能力从点云编码器转移到图像编码器。对比损失的正对是通过匹配算法和投影矩阵建立的。整个框架以无监督的端到端方式进行训练。据我们所知，这是第一项探索户外多模态数据集对比学习预训练策略的研究，其中包含配对相机图像和激光雷达点云。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/zhyever/SimIPU 获取。 本文提出SimIPU方法，通过结合2D图像和3D点云的无监督预训练，学习空间感知的视觉表示以提升3D相关任务性能。 Zhenyu Li,Zehui Chen,Ang Li,Liangji Fang,Qinhong Jiang,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang,Bolei Zhou,Hang Zhao cs.CV

title: DualFormer: Local-Global Stratified Transformer for Efficient Video Recognition
title_zh: DualFormer：用于高效视频识别的局部-全局分层变压器
abstract: While transformers have shown great potential on video recognition with their strong capability of capturing long-range dependencies, they often suffer high computational costs induced by the self-attention to the huge number of 3D tokens. In this paper, we present a new transformer architecture termed DualFormer, which can efficiently perform space-time attention for video recognition. Concretely, DualFormer stratifies the full space-time attention into dual cascaded levels, i.e., to first learn fine-grained local interactions among nearby 3D tokens, and then to capture coarse-grained global dependencies between the query token and global pyramid contexts. Different from existing methods that apply space-time factorization or restrict attention computations within local windows for improving efficiency, our local-global stratification strategy can well capture both short- and long-range spatiotemporal dependencies, and meanwhile greatly reduces the number of keys and values in attention computation to boost efficiency. Experimental results verify the superiority of DualFormer on five video benchmarks against existing methods. In particular, DualFormer achieves 82.9%/85.2% top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400/600 with ~1000G inference FLOPs which is at least 3.2x fewer than existing methods with similar performance. We have released the source code at https://github.com/sail-sg/dualformer.
summary: While transformers have shown great potential on video recognition with their strong capability of capturing long-range dependencies, they often suffer high computational costs induced by the self-attention to the huge number of 3D tokens. In this paper, we present a new transformer architecture termed DualFormer, which can efficiently perform space-time attention for video recognition. Concretely, DualFormer stratifies the full space-time attention into dual cascaded levels, i.e., to first learn fine-grained local interactions among nearby 3D tokens, and then to capture coarse-grained global dependencies between the query token and global pyramid contexts. Different from existing methods that apply space-time factorization or restrict attention computations within local windows for improving efficiency, our local-global stratification strategy can well capture both short- and long-range spatiotemporal dependencies, and meanwhile greatly reduces the number of keys and values in attention computation to boost efficiency. Experimental results verify the superiority of DualFormer on five video benchmarks against existing methods. In particular, DualFormer achieves 82.9%/85.2% top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400/600 with ~1000G inference FLOPs which is at least 3.2x fewer than existing methods with similar performance. We have released the source code at https://github.com/sail-sg/dualformer.
abstract_zh: 虽然 Transformer 凭借其捕获远程依赖性的强大能力在视频识别方面显示出巨大的潜力，但它们经常因对大量 3D token 的自注意力而导致高昂的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 DualFormer 的新变压器架构，它可以有效地执行视频识别的时空注意力。具体来说，DualFormer 将完整的时空注意力分层为双级联，即首先学习附近 3D 标记之间的细粒度局部交互，然后捕获查询标记和全局金字塔上下文之间的粗粒度全局依赖关系。与现有的应用时空分解或将注意力计算限制在局部窗口内以提高效率的方法不同，我们的局部-全局分层策略可以很好地捕获短程和长程时空依赖性，同时大大减少注意力计算中的键和值的数量以提高效率。实验结果验证了 DualFormer 在五个视频基准上相对于现有方法的优越性。特别是，DualFormer 在 Kinetics-400/600 上实现了 82.9%/85.2% 的 top-1 精度，推理 FLOP 数约为 1000G，比具有类似性能的现有方法至少少了 3.2 倍。我们已在 https://github.com/sail-sg/dualformer 发布了源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DualFormer的新型Transformer架构，通过分层的局部-全局注意力机制实现高效的视频识别。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在视频识别中因处理大量3D tokens导致计算成本过高，现有方法通过空间-时间分解或局部窗口限制效率提升，但难以同时捕捉短程和长程时空依赖。
AI.method: DualFormer将时空注意力分层为两个级联阶段：首先学习局部3D tokens的细粒度交互，再通过金字塔上下文捕获全局依赖，显著减少注意力计算中的键值数量。
AI.result: 在五个视频基准测试中优于现有方法，尤其在Kinetics-400/600上达到82.9%/85.2%的Top-1准确率，计算量仅为同类方法的1/3.2。
AI.conclusion: DualFormer通过局部-全局分层策略有效平衡了效率与性能，为视频识别提供了新的高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xinyi Wu,Zhenyao Wu,Yuhang Lu,Lili Ju,Song Wang
title: Style Mixing and Patchwise Prototypical Matching for One-Shot Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于一次性无监督域自适应语义分割的风格混合和分片原型匹配
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of one-shot unsupervised domain adaptation (OSUDA) for semantic segmentation where the segmentors only see one unlabeled target image during training. In this case, traditional unsupervised domain adaptation models usually fail since they cannot adapt to the target domain with over-fitting to one (or few) target samples. To address this problem, existing OSUDA methods usually integrate a style-transfer module to perform domain randomization based on the unlabeled target sample, with which multiple domains around the target sample can be explored during training. However, such a style-transfer module relies on an additional set of images as style reference for pre-training and also increases the memory demand for domain adaptation. Here we propose a new OSUDA method that can effectively relieve such computational burden. Specifically, we integrate several style-mixing layers into the segmentor which play the role of style-transfer module to stylize the source images without introducing any learned parameters. Moreover, we propose a patchwise prototypical matching (PPM) method to weighted consider the importance of source pixels during the supervised training to relieve the negative adaptation. Experimental results show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on two commonly used benchmarks for domain adaptive semantic segmentation under the one-shot setting and is more efficient than all comparison approaches.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the problem of one-shot unsupervised domain adaptation (OSUDA) for semantic segmentation where the segmentors only see one unlabeled target image during training. In this case, traditional unsupervised domain adaptation models usually fail since they cannot adapt to the target domain with over-fitting to one (or few) target samples. To address this problem, existing OSUDA methods usually integrate a style-transfer module to perform domain randomization based on the unlabeled target sample, with which multiple domains around the target sample can be explored during training. However, such a style-transfer module relies on an additional set of images as style reference for pre-training and also increases the memory demand for domain adaptation. Here we propose a new OSUDA method that can effectively relieve such computational burden. Specifically, we integrate several style-mixing layers into the segmentor which play the role of style-transfer module to stylize the source images without introducing any learned parameters. Moreover, we propose a patchwise prototypical matching (PPM) method to weighted consider the importance of source pixels during the supervised training to relieve the negative adaptation. Experimental results show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on two commonly used benchmarks for domain adaptive semantic segmentation under the one-shot setting and is more efficient than all comparison approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了语义分割的一次性无监督域适应（OSUDA）问题，其中分割器在训练期间仅看到一张未标记的目标图像。在这种情况下，传统的无监督域适应模型通常会失败，因为它们无法通过对一个（或几个）目标样本的过度拟合来适应目标域。为了解决这个问题，现有的OSUDA方法通常集成风格迁移模块来基于未标记的目标样本进行域随机化，在训练过程中可以探索目标样本周围的多个域。然而，这种风格转移模块依赖于一组额外的图像作为预训练的风格参考，并且还增加了领域适应的内存需求。在这里，我们提出了一种新的 OSUDA 方法，可以有效减轻这种计算负担。具体来说，我们将几个风格混合层集成到分割器中，这些层起到风格转移模块的作用，在不引入任何学习参数的情况下对源图像进行风格化。此外，我们提出了一种补丁原型匹配（PPM）方法来加权考虑监督训练期间源像素的重要性，以减轻负适应。实验结果表明，我们的方法在一次性设置下的域自适应语义分割的两个常用基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，并且比所有比较方法都更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的单样本无监督域适应语义分割方法，旨在解决在只有一个未标记的目标图像时传统方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统的无监督域适应方法在只有一个未标记的目标图像时容易过拟合，且依赖额外的风格参考图像和较高的内存需求。
AI.method: 本文引入了风格混合层和块级原型匹配方法，以在不引入额外参数的情况下实现风格迁移，并通过加权考虑源像素的重要性来缓解负适应。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在两个常用域适应语义分割基准上取得了新的最先进性能，并且比所有对比方法更高效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的新方法有效缓解了单样本无监督域适应中的计算负担，并在性能和效率方面均优于现有方法。

search_text: Style Mixing and Patchwise Prototypical Matching for One-Shot Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation 用于一次性无监督域自适应语义分割的风格混合和分片原型匹配 In this paper, we tackle the problem of one-shot unsupervised domain adaptation (OSUDA) for semantic segmentation where the segmentors only see one unlabeled target image during training. In this case, traditional unsupervised domain adaptation models usually fail since they cannot adapt to the target domain with over-fitting to one (or few) target samples. To address this problem, existing OSUDA methods usually integrate a style-transfer module to perform domain randomization based on the unlabeled target sample, with which multiple domains around the target sample can be explored during training. However, such a style-transfer module relies on an additional set of images as style reference for pre-training and also increases the memory demand for domain adaptation. Here we propose a new OSUDA method that can effectively relieve such computational burden. Specifically, we integrate several style-mixing layers into the segmentor which play the role of style-transfer module to stylize the source images without introducing any learned parameters. Moreover, we propose a patchwise prototypical matching (PPM) method to weighted consider the importance of source pixels during the supervised training to relieve the negative adaptation. Experimental results show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on two commonly used benchmarks for domain adaptive semantic segmentation under the one-shot setting and is more efficient than all comparison approaches. 在本文中，我们解决了语义分割的一次性无监督域适应（OSUDA）问题，其中分割器在训练期间仅看到一张未标记的目标图像。在这种情况下，传统的无监督域适应模型通常会失败，因为它们无法通过对一个（或几个）目标样本的过度拟合来适应目标域。为了解决这个问题，现有的OSUDA方法通常集成风格迁移模块来基于未标记的目标样本进行域随机化，在训练过程中可以探索目标样本周围的多个域。然而，这种风格转移模块依赖于一组额外的图像作为预训练的风格参考，并且还增加了领域适应的内存需求。在这里，我们提出了一种新的 OSUDA 方法，可以有效减轻这种计算负担。具体来说，我们将几个风格混合层集成到分割器中，这些层起到风格转移模块的作用，在不引入任何学习参数的情况下对源图像进行风格化。此外，我们提出了一种补丁原型匹配（PPM）方法来加权考虑监督训练期间源像素的重要性，以减轻负适应。实验结果表明，我们的方法在一次性设置下的域自适应语义分割的两个常用基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，并且比所有比较方法都更有效。 本文提出了一种新的单样本无监督域适应语义分割方法，旨在解决在只有一个未标记的目标图像时传统方法的不足。 Xinyi Wu,Zhenyao Wu,Yuhang Lu,Lili Ju,Song Wang cs.CV

title: Dual Cluster Contrastive learning for Object Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于对象重识别的双簇对比学习
comment: Some errors were found in the method and experimental work that need further correction and improvement
comments: Some errors were found in the method and experimental work that need further correction and improvement
abstract: Recently, cluster contrastive learning has been proven effective for object ReID by computing the contrastive loss between the individual features and the cluster memory. However, existing methods that use the individual features to momentum update the cluster memory will fluctuate over the training examples, especially for the outlier samples. Unlike the individual-based updating mechanism, the centroid-based updating mechanism that applies the mean feature of each cluster to update the cluster memory can reduce the impact of individual samples. Therefore, we formulate the individual-based updating and centroid-based updating mechanisms in a unified cluster contrastive framework, named Dual Cluster Contrastive framework (DCC), which maintains two types of memory banks: individual and centroid cluster memory banks. Significantly, the individual cluster memory considers just one individual at a time to take a single step for updating. The centroid cluster memory applies the mean feature of each cluster to update the corresponding cluster memory. During optimization, besides the vallina contrastive loss of each memory, a cross-view consistency constraint is applied to exchange the benefits of two memories for generating a discriminative description for the object ReID. Note that DCC can be easily applied for unsupervised or supervised object ReID by using ground-truth labels or the generated pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks, \emph{e.g.,} Market-1501, MSMT17, and VeRi-776, under \textbf{supervised Object ReID} and \textbf{unsupervised Object ReID} demonstrate the superiority of the proposed DCC.

abstract_zh: 最近，通过计算单个特征和集群内存之间的对比损失，集群对比学习已被证明对于对象 ReID 是有效的。然而，使用单个特征来动量更新集群内存的现有方法将在训练样本上波动，特别是对于离群样本。与基于个体的更新机制不同，基于质心的更新机制应用每个簇的平均特征来更新簇记忆，可以减少个体样本的影响。因此，我们在统一的集群对比框架中制定了基于个体的更新和基于质心的更新机制，称为双集群对比框架（DCC），它维护两种类型的存储库：个体和质心集群存储库。值得注意的是，个体簇内存一次只考虑一个个体来采取单个步骤进行更新。质心簇存储器应用每个簇的平均特征来更新相应的簇存储器。在优化过程中，除了每个存储器的vallina对比损失之外，还应用跨视图一致性约束来交换两个存储器的优势，以生成对象ReID的判别性描述。请注意，通过使用真实标签或生成的伪标签，DCC 可以轻松应用于无监督或监督对象 ReID。在 \textbf{supervised Object ReID} 和 \textbf{unsupervised Object ReID} 下对三个基准（\emph{例如}Market-1501、MSMT17 和 VeRi-776）进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的 DCC 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DCC的双聚类对比学习框架，用于改进物体重新识别（ReID）任务，通过结合个体和聚类中心的更新机制提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于个体特征更新聚类记忆的方法在处理异常样本时易产生波动，而基于聚类中心的更新机制能减少个体样本的影响，因此需统一这两种机制以提升稳定性。
AI.method: 构建包含个体聚类记忆库和聚类中心记忆库的双记忆框架，分别采用个体特征和聚类均值更新记忆，并引入跨视角一致性约束以增强特征判别性。
AI.result: 在Market-1501、MSMT17和VeRi-776三个基准数据集的监督与无监督ReID实验中，DCC方法均取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: DCC框架通过融合个体与聚类中心更新机制，有效提升了ReID任务的鲁棒性与准确性，且适用于有监督和无监督场景。

title: Extending nn-UNet for brain tumor segmentation
title_zh: 扩展 nn-UNet 进行脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Brain tumor segmentation is essential for the diagnosis and prognosis of patients with gliomas. The brain tumor segmentation challenge has continued to provide a great source of data to develop automatic algorithms to perform the task. This paper describes our contribution to the 2021 competition. We developed our methods based on nn-UNet, the winning entry of last year competition. We experimented with several modifications, including using a larger network, replacing batch normalization with group normalization, and utilizing axial attention in the decoder. Internal 5-fold cross validation as well as online evaluation from the organizers showed the effectiveness of our approach, with minor improvement in quantitative metrics when compared to the baseline. The proposed models won first place in the final ranking on unseen test data. The codes, pretrained weights, and docker image for the winning submission are publicly available at https://github.com/rixez/Brats21_KAIST_MRI_Lab

abstract_zh: 脑肿瘤分割对于神经胶质瘤患者的诊断和预后至关重要。脑肿瘤分割挑战继续为开发执行任务的自动算法提供大量数据源。本文介绍了我们对 2021 年竞赛的贡献。我们基于去年比赛的获奖作品 nn-UNet 开发了我们的方法。我们尝试了一些修改，包括使用更大的网络、用组归一化替换批量归一化以及在解码器中利用轴向注意力。内部 5 倍交叉验证以及组织者的在线评估显示了我们方法的有效性，与基线相比，定量指标略有改善。所提出的模型在未见测试数据的最终排名中获得第一名。获胜提交的代码、预训练权重和 Docker 镜像可在 https://github.com/rixez/Brats21_KAIST_MRI_Lab 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文基于nn-UNet框架改进脑肿瘤分割方法，在2021年比赛中取得第一名。
AI.motivation: nn-UNet作为去年比赛冠军方案，需进一步优化以提升脑肿瘤分割精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 扩展网络规模、替换为组归一化层、在解码器引入轴向注意力机制，并通过5折交叉验证与在线评估验证效果。
AI.result: 在内部验证与竞赛测试中均取得性能提升，最终在盲测数据中排名第一，开源代码与模型权重已公开。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的nn-UNet变体有效提升了分割性能，公开的实现可为后续研究提供参考。

The codes, pretrained weights, and docker image for the winning submission are publicly available at https://github.com/rixez/Brats21_KAIST_MRI_Lab 脑肿瘤分割对于神经胶质瘤患者的诊断和预后至关重要。脑肿瘤分割挑战继续为开发执行任务的自动算法提供大量数据源。本文介绍了我们对 2021 年竞赛的贡献。我们基于去年比赛的获奖作品 nn-UNet 开发了我们的方法。我们尝试了一些修改，包括使用更大的网络、用组归一化替换批量归一化以及在解码器中利用轴向注意力。内部 5 倍交叉验证以及组织者的在线评估显示了我们方法的有效性，与基线相比，定量指标略有改善。所提出的模型在未见测试数据的最终排名中获得第一名。获胜提交的代码、预训练权重和 Docker 镜像可在 https://github.com/rixez/Brats21_KAIST_MRI_Lab 上公开获取 本文基于nn-UNet框架改进脑肿瘤分割方法，在2021年比赛中取得第一名。 Huan Minh Luu,Sung-Hong Park eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: David B. Lindell,Dave Van Veen,Jeong Joon Park,Gordon Wetzstein
title: BACON: Band-limited Coordinate Networks for Multiscale Scene Representation
title_zh: BACON：用于多尺度场景表示的带限坐标网络
abstract: Coordinate-based networks have emerged as a powerful tool for 3D representation and scene reconstruction. These networks are trained to map continuous input coordinates to the value of a signal at each point. Still, current architectures are black boxes: their spectral characteristics cannot be easily analyzed, and their behavior at unsupervised points is difficult to predict. Moreover, these networks are typically trained to represent a signal at a single scale, so naive downsampling or upsampling results in artifacts. We introduce band-limited coordinate networks (BACON), a network architecture with an analytical Fourier spectrum. BACON has constrained behavior at unsupervised points, can be designed based on the spectral characteristics of the represented signal, and can represent signals at multiple scales without per-scale supervision. We demonstrate BACON for multiscale neural representation of images, radiance fields, and 3D scenes using signed distance functions and show that it outperforms conventional single-scale coordinate networks in terms of interpretability and quality.
summary: Coordinate-based networks have emerged as a powerful tool for 3D representation and scene reconstruction. These networks are trained to map continuous input coordinates to the value of a signal at each point. Still, current architectures are black boxes: their spectral characteristics cannot be easily analyzed, and their behavior at unsupervised points is difficult to predict. Moreover, these networks are typically trained to represent a signal at a single scale, so naive downsampling or upsampling results in artifacts. We introduce band-limited coordinate networks (BACON), a network architecture with an analytical Fourier spectrum. BACON has constrained behavior at unsupervised points, can be designed based on the spectral characteristics of the represented signal, and can represent signals at multiple scales without per-scale supervision. We demonstrate BACON for multiscale neural representation of images, radiance fields, and 3D scenes using signed distance functions and show that it outperforms conventional single-scale coordinate networks in terms of interpretability and quality.
abstract_zh: 基于坐标的网络已成为 3D 表示和场景重建的强大工具。这些网络经过训练，可以将连续输入坐标映射到每个点的信号值。尽管如此，当前的架构仍然是黑匣子：它们的光谱特征无法轻易分析，并且它们在无人监督点的行为很难预测。此外，这些网络通常经过训练以表示单一尺度的信号，因此简单的下采样或上采样会导致伪影。我们引入限带坐标网络（BACON），这是一种具有分析傅里叶谱的网络架构。 BACON 在无监督点上具有约束行为，可以根据所表示信号的频谱特性进行设计，并且可以在多个尺度上表示信号，而无需按尺度进行监督。我们使用有符号距离函数演示了用于图像、辐射场和 3D 场景的多尺度神经表示的 BACON，并表明它在可解释性和质量方面优于传统的单尺度坐标网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BACON的带限坐标网络，用于实现多尺度场景表示。
AI.motivation: 现有的坐标网络在多尺度场景表示中存在行为难以预测、缺乏频谱分析能力以及需要逐尺度监督等问题。
AI.method: BACON通过引入具有分析傅里叶谱的网络结构，限制了未监督点的行为，并能基于信号的频谱特性进行设计，实现多尺度信号表示而无需逐尺度监督。
AI.result: BACON在图像、辐射场和3D场景的多尺度神经表示中表现出优于传统单尺度坐标网络的可解释性和质量。
AI.conclusion: BACON为多尺度场景表示提供了一种具有频谱特性的有效网络结构，提升了可解释性和表示质量。

title: Safe Autonomous Navigation for Systems with Learned SE(3) Hamiltonian Dynamics
title_zh: 具有学习 SE(3) 哈密顿动力学的系统的安全自主导航
abstract: Safe autonomous navigation in unknown environments is an important problem for mobile robots. This paper proposes techniques to learn the dynamics model of a mobile robot from trajectory data and synthesize a tracking controller with safety and stability guarantees. The state of a rigid-body robot usually contains its position, orientation, and generalized velocity and satisfies Hamilton's equations of motion. Instead of a hand-derived dynamics model, we use a dataset of state-control trajectories to train a translation-equivariant nonlinear Hamiltonian model represented as a neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) network. The learned Hamiltonian model is used to synthesize an energy-shaping passivity-based controller and derive conditions which guarantee safe regulation to a desired reference pose. We enable adaptive tracking of a desired path, subject to safety constraints obtained from obstacle distance measurements. The trade-off between the robot's energy and the distance to safety constraint violation is used to adaptively govern a reference pose along the desired path. Our safe adaptive controller is demonstrated on a simulated hexarotor robot navigating in an unknown environments.
summary: Safe autonomous navigation in unknown environments is an important problem for mobile robots. This paper proposes techniques to learn the dynamics model of a mobile robot from trajectory data and synthesize a tracking controller with safety and stability guarantees. The state of a rigid-body robot usually contains its position, orientation, and generalized velocity and satisfies Hamilton's equations of motion. Instead of a hand-derived dynamics model, we use a dataset of state-control trajectories to train a translation-equivariant nonlinear Hamiltonian model represented as a neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) network. The learned Hamiltonian model is used to synthesize an energy-shaping passivity-based controller and derive conditions which guarantee safe regulation to a desired reference pose. We enable adaptive tracking of a desired path, subject to safety constraints obtained from obstacle distance measurements. The trade-off between the robot's energy and the distance to safety constraint violation is used to adaptively govern a reference pose along the desired path. Our safe adaptive controller is demonstrated on a simulated hexarotor robot navigating in an unknown environments.
abstract_zh: 未知环境中的安全自主导航是移动机器人的一个重要问题。本文提出了从轨迹数据中学习移动机器人动力学模型并合成具有安全性和稳定性保证的跟踪控制器的技术。刚体机器人的状态通常包含其位置、方向和广义速度，并满足哈密顿运动方程。我们使用状态控制轨迹数据集来训练表示为神经常微分方程 (ODE) 网络的平移等变非线性哈密顿模型，而不是手动导出的动力学模型。学习到的哈密顿模型用于合成基于能量整形无源性的控制器，并导出保证安全调节到所需参考位姿的条件。我们能够根据障碍物距离测量获得的安全约束，实现对所需路径的自适应跟踪。机器人的能量和违反安全约束的距离之间的权衡用于自适应地控制沿所需路径的参考姿势。我们的安全自适应控制器在未知环境中导航的模拟六旋翼机器人上进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的SE(3)哈密顿动力学模型，用于实现移动机器人在未知环境中的安全自主导航。
AI.motivation: 传统手动推导的动力学模型难以适应复杂未知环境，且缺乏安全保证，需通过数据驱动方法实现安全可控的自主导航。
AI.method: 利用轨迹数据训练平移等变神经ODE网络建模哈密顿动力学，结合能量塑造控制器与障碍物约束条件，实现自适应安全路径跟踪。
AI.result: 在模拟六旋翼机器人实验中验证了控制器在未知环境中的安全导航能力，有效平衡了能量消耗与安全约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据驱动动力学建模与安全控制器合成，为复杂环境下的机器人自主导航提供了新思路。
